cmd: nix develop --command python3 tools/coverage/package_gate.py --run-coverage && nix develop --command bazel run //tools/coverage:package_gate -- --threshold=70
desc: Regenerate the fixed M0-002 coverage population, bind LCOV to its exact source snapshot/revision and report digest, then enforce the per-package 70% gate.

history.note: Verifier N11 showed mtime-only freshness accepted touched stale LCOV; the snapshot producer is now part of the registered check.
